\begin{tabular}{@{}lll@{}}
\toprule
Item & Value & Role \\

Cash share & U[0.02, 0.08] & OFR range anchor \\
Funding scale & U[0.75, 1.25] & Normalized heterogeneity \\

Reference stress budget $B$ & 0.15 & 30-day normalized budget \\
Calibration ratio $\rho$ & 0.5, 1, 2 & Funding-to-market budget allocation \\
Channel intensities & 0, 1, 2 & Applied separately \\
Horizon & 30 days & Fixed \\
Institutions/block & 100 & Selected by finite-population QA \\
Replication blocks & 200 & Paired Monte Carlo units \\

\footnotesize Notes: OFR values anchor leverage and cash ranges. The reference market loss is the q95 21-trading-day loss (6.34\%). Other model parameters are explicitly normalized or scenario anchored; none is presented as an estimated structural parameter.
